description_en: A reconciliation text with two text parts

text_parts.name: part_1
text_parts.content:
{% comment %}reconciliation_text_1 - part_1{% endcomment %}
Debit: {{ period.accounts["100"].debit | currency }}

text_parts.name: part_2
text_parts.content:
{% comment %}reconciliation_text_1 - part_2{% endcomment %}
Credit: {{ period.accounts["100"].credit | currency }}

tests:
test_basic:
  name: Basic balance test
  expectation: |
    Balance: 1,000.00
